name: Loadstone
description: Loadstone — AI search infrastructure platform for building semantic and hybrid search into applications.

seo.title: Loadstone Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Loadstone analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Search / Recommendations API.

review.verdict: Loadstone is a Search / Recommendations API tool.
pros: Sub-50ms search with managed indexing and relevance tuning
cons: Pricing jumps sharply above free tier record limits
review.best_for: E-commerce and content platforms needing fast search
review.not_for: Simple CRUD apps with basic filtering needs
